name: Pumpkin Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. In a covered saucepan, heat all ingredients except cream and parsley until boiling.
2. Reduce heat; simmer, uncovered, for 20 minutes.
3. Remove half of the pumpkin using a slotted spoon; reserve.
4. Simmer the remaining pumpkin mixture, uncovered, for another 20 minutes.
5. Transfer to a large bowl.
6. Puree 2 cups of the pumpkin mixture in a blender or food processor; return pureed mixture to pot.
7. Repeat with the remaining pumpkin mixture.
8. Heat the pureed mixture until boiling; reduce heat.
9. Simmer uncovered for 10 minutes.
10. Add the reserved pumpkin and whipping cream.
11. Serve, garnished with parsley.
